name: Maraschino Pecan Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red and green Maraschino cherries, whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients according to the manufacturer's suggestion.
2. Drain cherries well on a paper towel and add them whole for best appearance.
3. Add the fruit and nuts at the beep of the end of the first mixing cycle.
